channel.title: Altirra update feed (release channel)
channel.description: Automatic update notifications for release versions of the Altirra emulator.

ul.li: Accuracy: ANTIC line buffer and POKEY pot scan fixes.
Debugger: Improved UI docking, memory and history windows, performance analyzer.
Devices: Added The Pill, Black Box Floppy Board, Speedy XF, CSS Multiplexer, XM301; VBXE, 850, modem improvements.
Disk: Indus GT fixes; improved acceleration timing; Disk Explorer fixes.
Display: Screen masks, D3D11 custom effects, improved bloom.
Input: Paddle noise, XInput fixes, grounded internal POT lines.
Recording: Pause/resume, stereo SAP type R, VGM support.
